chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2098 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on office objections 1 to 3. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 29.08.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. None present on behalf of the petitioner. Since the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and the alternate remedy has been provided; therefore, this petition stands disposed of with the directions to the petitioner to approach the trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
